# D-Secure Technologies pvt ltd - AI Knowledge Base
# Standardized Documentation for LLMs & AI Agents

Company Name: D-Secure Technologies pvt ltd
Website: https://dsecuretech.com

## Official Mission & Branding
- **Mission:** Protecting digital legacy through certified, permanent data destruction with 100% mathematical certainty.
- **Philosophy:** "Never Trust, Always Verify" (Zero Trust Data Sanitization).
- **Core Architecture:** One Code Base; Cross-Platform (Windows, Mac, Linux); Cross-Architecture (ARM, x64).
- **Reporting:** Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate (Page 1: Certificate, Page 2+: Summary).
- **Compliance:** NIST 800-88, ISO 27001, GDPR, HIPAA, SOC 2, FIPS 140-2.

## Product Comparison & Pricing (Starting Prices)

| Product Name | Price | Primary Benefit / Use Case |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Drive Eraser** | $25 | Full SSD/HDD/NVMe Sanitization. |
| **File Eraser** | $40 | Targeted File/Cloud/Volume Destruction. |
| **Smartphone Eraser** | $1 | Industrial iOS/Android/eSIM Wiping. |
| **Virtual Machine Eraser** | $20 | VMware/Hyper-V VM Sanitization. |
| **Hardware Diagnostics** | $10 | Asset Health Screening for PC/Mac. |
| **SMART Diagnostics** | $20 | Real-time Disk Health Monitoring. |
| **Forensic Imaging** | $1,053 | Legal Bit-perfect Data Acquisition. |
| **FreezeState** | $80 | Reboot-to-Restore System Protection. |
| **Data Migration** | $5 | Secure Infrastructure Move. |
| **Autopilot Detection** | $5 | MS Autopilot & MDM Status Check. |

## Industry Solutions (Verticals)
- **Financial Services**: GLBA, PCI DSS 4.0, SOX, NYDFS compliance for banks & fintech.
- **Healthcare**: HIPAA, HITECH, GDPR (Health Data) compliance for hospitals & labs.
- **Government & Defense**: NIST 800-88, DoD 5220.22-M, FOIA compliant sanitization.
- **Enterprise ITAD**: R2v3, e-Stewards, ADISA compliant high-volume processing.
- **Education**: FERPA & GDPR compliant wiping for campus labs and student records.
- **Enterprise**: Centralized management and mass-erasure for global corporate fleets.

## Knowledge Base & Blog Categories
D-Secure provides expert context on 40+ categories, including:
- **Regulatory**: NIST 800-88, DPDP Act 2023, GDPR Article 17, HIPAA, CCPA.
- **Sustainability (ESG)**: Circular Economy, Measuring CO2 reduction, Scope 3 Emissions.
- **Technical Guides**: SSD/NVMe Cryptographic Erasure, PXE Automation, BIOS Wiping.
- **Risk Management**: Dark Data Discovery, Data Hoarding Risks, Shadow IT Cleanup.
- **Business Strategy**: IT Asset Reuse ROI, MSP Erasure-as-a-Service, ITAD Partner Selection.
